title: AreaProperties Object
description: The Area properties of a sketch profile or planar surface.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: getCentroidMomentsOfInertia
methods.description: Method that returns the moments of inertia about the centroid. Unit for returned values is kg*cm^2.

methods.name: getMomentsOfInertia
methods.description: Method that, for a sketch, returns the moments of inertia about the sketch origin. For a planar face, this method returns the moments about the world coordinate system origin. Unit for returned values is kg*cm^2.

methods.name: getPrincipalAxes
methods.description: Method that returns the principal axes.

methods.name: getPrincipalMomentsOfInertia
methods.description: Method that returns the moments of inertia about the principal axes. Unit for returned values is kg*cm^2.

methods.name: getRadiusOfGyration
methods.description: Method that returns the radius of gyration about the principal axes. Unit for returned values is cm.

properties.name: accuracy
properties.description: Returns the accuracy that was used for the calculation.

properties.name: area
properties.description: Gets the area in the square centimeters.

properties.name: centroid
properties.description: Gets the centroid where the units are centimeters. The Location is relative to the sketch origin for a profile or relative to the world coordinate system for a planar face.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: perimeter
properties.description: Gets the perimeter in centimeters. The perimeter is the sum of the length of all the curves or edges of the profile or planar surface

properties.name: rotationToPrincipal
properties.description: Gets the angle of rotation of the principal axes.

related_samples.name: Patch Feature API Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates creating a new patch feature.

accuracy.title: AreaProperties.accuracy Property
accuracy.description: Returns the accuracy that was used for the calculation.

syntax.python:

propertyValue = areaProperties_var.accuracy

classType.title: AreaProperties.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

getCentroidMomentsOfInertia.title: AreaProperties.getCentroidMomentsOfInertia Method
getCentroidMomentsOfInertia.description: Method that returns the moments of inertia about the centroid. Unit for returned values is kg*cm^2.

syntax.python: (returnValue, ixx, iyy, izz, ixy, iyz, ixz) = areaProperties_var.getCentroidMomentsOfInertia()
syntax.cpp: #include getCentroidMomentsOfInertia(ixx, iyy, izz, ixy, iyz, ixz);

parameters.name: ixx
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the XX partial moment.

parameters.name: iyy
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the YY partial moment.

parameters.name: izz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the ZZ partial moment.

parameters.name: ixy
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the XY partial moment.

parameters.name: iyz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the YZ partial moment.

parameters.name: ixz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the XZ partial moment.

getMomentsOfInertia.title: AreaProperties.getMomentsOfInertia Method
getMomentsOfInertia.description: Method that, for a sketch, returns the moments of inertia about the sketch origin. For a planar face, this method returns the moments about the world coordinate system origin. Unit for returned values is kg*cm^2.

syntax.python: (returnValue, ixx, iyy, izz, ixy, iyz, ixz) = areaProperties_var.getMomentsOfInertia()
syntax.cpp: #include getMomentsOfInertia(ixx, iyy, izz, ixy, iyz, ixz);

parameters.name: ixx
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the XX partial moment.

parameters.name: iyy
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the YY partial moment.

parameters.name: izz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the ZZ partial moment.

parameters.name: ixy
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the XY partial moment.

parameters.name: iyz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the YZ partial moment.

parameters.name: ixz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the XZ partial moment.

getPrincipalAxes.title: AreaProperties.getPrincipalAxes Method
getPrincipalAxes.description: Method that returns the principal axes.

parameters.name: xAxis
parameters.description: The output Vector3D object that indicates the direction of the x axis.

parameters.name: yAxis
parameters.description: The output Vector3D object that indicates the direction of the y axis.

getPrincipalMomentsOfInertia.title: AreaProperties.getPrincipalMomentsOfInertia Method
getPrincipalMomentsOfInertia.description: Method that returns the moments of inertia about the principal axes. Unit for returned values is kg*cm^2.

parameters.name: i1
parameters.description: Output Double that specifies the first moment of inertia.

parameters.name: i2
parameters.description: Output Double that specifies the second moment of inertia.

parameters.name: i3
parameters.description: Output Double that specifies the third moment of inertia.

getRadiusOfGyration.title: AreaProperties.getRadiusOfGyration Method
getRadiusOfGyration.description: Method that returns the radius of gyration about the principal axes. Unit for returned values is cm.

parameters.name: kxx
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the X partial radius of gyration.

parameters.name: kyy
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the Y partial radius of gyration.

parameters.name: kzz
parameters.description: Output Double that returns the Z partial radius of gyration.
